items.title: Israel drops leaflets over south Lebanon town ordering residents to leave
items.desc: Israeli forces dropped leaflets over the southern Lebanese town of Mansouri on Friday ordering residents to leave, Lebanese state media reported. It was the first such order issued since the latest ceasefire between Israel and Hezbollah took effect.

items.title: Trump says Iran strike in Strait of Hormuz is a ‘foolish violation’ of agreement | CNN Politics
items.desc: President Donald Trump called Iran’s strike on a vessel in the Strait of Hormuz a “foolish violation” of the agreement to end the war with Tehran, but offered little indication the episode would prompt a return to active hostilities.
